narrative:
Fairfield Township has 16,237 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.8 percentage points.
